title: Errors — top ERROR-severity pattern
prompt: What's our single highest-volume ERROR-severity log pattern in the last 24h? Name it specifically and tell me how much volume it's producing. Then briefly characterize whether it looks like a real incident or chatter.
persona: Oncall SRE reviewing the error backlog. Wants the single biggest pattern, not a top-N list.

expected_answer.summary: The top ERROR-severity pattern is service_instance_id_service_name_otelcol_contrib_service_version_otelcol at ~397MB / 24h. Total ERROR volume is ~464MB / 24h.
